summary: Tested Credit Period and Credit Surcharge features for B2B fabric sourcing platform. All backend tests (9/9) and frontend tests passed. Credit charge (1.5%/month × period/30) correctly appears when Locofast Credit Line is selected and disappears when Razorpay is selected. The Locofast Credit Line label correctly shows '<period>-day terms' and '1.5%/mo surcharge applies' subtitle.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Credit Period and Credit Surcharge features verified: (1) GET /api/brand/credit-summary returns credit_period_days (30/60/90), (2) POST /api/brand/orders with payment_method='credit' computes credit_charge = pre_credit_total * 0.015 * (period/30), (3) POST /api/brand/orders/razorpay/create does NOT include credit charge, (4) PUT /api/admin/brands/{id} can update credit_period_days (validates 30/60/90), (5) Frontend BrandCart.js shows 'Credit charges (1.5% × N mo)' row when Locofast Credit Line is selected, (6) Credit charge row disappears when Razorpay is selected, (7) Locofast Credit Line label shows '<period>-day terms' and '1.5%/mo surcharge applies' subtitle. Math verified: 500m @ ₹150/m = ₹75,000 subtotal + ₹3,750 tax + ₹3,000 logistics = ₹81,750 pre-credit, credit_charge = ₹81,750 * 0.015 * 1 = ₹1,226.25, total = ₹82,976.25.

admin_update_credit_period.details: PUT /api/admin/brands/{id} can set credit_period_days to 30/60/90, rejects invalid values

credit_charge_computation.details: POST /api/brand/orders with payment_method='credit' computes credit_charge = pre_credit_total * 0.015 * (period/30)

razorpay_no_surcharge.details: POST /api/brand/orders/razorpay/create returns total WITHOUT credit charge

frontend_credit_charge_row.details: Credit charges row appears in Order Summary when Locofast Credit Line is selected, shows 'Credit charges (1.5% × 1 mo)' with correct value +₹1,226.25

frontend_credit_charge_toggle.details: Credit charges row disappears when switching to Razorpay, reappears when switching back to Credit

frontend_credit_line_label.details: Locofast Credit Line label shows '30-day terms' and '1.5%/mo surcharge applies' subtitle

frontend_totals_update.details: Bulk total and Grand total correctly update: ₹81,750 (Razorpay) vs ₹82,976.25 (Credit)
